verses.text: A sin offering is appointed for sin done ignorantly; the anointed priest brings a bullock. Sin offering. Even unwitting sin must be atoned.
A sin offering is appointed for sin done ignorantly; the anointed priest brings a bullock. Sin offering. Even unwitting sin must be atoned.
A sin offering is appointed for sin done ignorantly; the anointed priest brings a bullock. Sin offering. Even unwitting sin must be atoned.
He lays his hand on it, kills it, and sprinkles its blood before the veil. Blood sprinkled. Atonement is made by blood.

Its fat is burnt on the altar; the rest is burnt outside the camp. Outside the camp. Sin is carried away from the holy.

For the whole congregation's ignorant sin, the elders bring a bullock. The congregation. Corporate sin needs atonement too.

Its blood is sprinkled, the fat burnt, the body burnt outside the camp. Burnt outside. The people's sin is carried away.

For a ruler's sin, a kid of the goats is offered. The ruler. Leaders too must bring a sin offering.

For one of the common people, a kid; the priest atones, and it is forgiven. Forgiven. God pardons the contrite.

For one of the common people, a kid; the priest atones, and it is forgiven. Forgiven. God pardons the contrite.
A lamb may be brought instead; the priest atones, and it is forgiven. Atoned. The blood always brings forgiveness.
